text:
Sh 00' 52"
Case 2:
For sure your birth star is Revati. The trine stars would be
Aslesha-Jyeshta-Revati. Asc x 81 should fall in any of these
3 stars is the condition. [i.e. Asc(Body) and Moon (Mind)
should make a combined effort for the birth to take place].
Same as above.
1) If the BT is Sh 27' 02" Kunda falls on Aslesha.
2) If the BT is Sh 33' 00" Kunda falls on Jyeshta.
3) If the BT is Sh 39' 30" Kunda falls on Revati.
2 and 3 are far outside the limits we arrived at. Discarding
both of them we conclude that if the BT is between Sh 27' 02"
and Sh 31' 18" ., then it is Sh 27' 02".
Therefore the conclusion drawn by Kunda Method is that
either BT is Sh 00' 52" or Sh 27' 02". Now going for all 4
methods in Varga Chathushtaya method, we get,

98 Secrets of Birth Time Rectification
Case 1: (BTis ShOO' 52" AM)
= =
Asc x 81 293° 10' x 81 347° 06' (Revati)- Condition
Satisfied.
= =
Asc x 9 293° 10' x 9 118° 30' (Aslesha) - Condition
Satisfied.
